tasks.title: Confirm ConditionMatcher is the canonical shared PHP-side condition matcher
tasks.description: Document that ConditionMatcher already backs PropertyRbacHandler and now becomes the sole backing for PermissionHandler and MagicRbacHandler::hasPermission.

tasks.title: Confirm no other apps carry a parallel conditional-match implementation
tasks.description: Scan opencatalogi, softwarecatalog, procest, pipelinq, docudesk. Flag any duplicate as a follow-up change.

tasks.title: Record findings in a docblock pointing to ConditionMatcher
tasks.description: Top of PermissionHandler::hasGroupPermission() — deduplication note referencing the canonical matcher.

tasks.title: Inject ConditionMatcher into PermissionHandler
tasks.description: Constructor-injected dependency. Update DI wiring in Application.php only if auto-wiring does not resolve it.

tasks.title: Remove PermissionHandler::evaluateMatchConditions()
tasks.description: Delete method body and signature (lines 588–623). No deprecation shim.

tasks.title: Update hasGroupPermission() to build envelope and delegate
tasks.description: Fold $objectOrganisation into $objectData['@self']['organisation'] and call ConditionMatcher::objectMatchesConditions.

tasks.title: Narrow hasGroupPermission() signature
tasks.description: Remove activeOrganisation parameter; keep objectData + objectOrganisation split and merge inside the method to minimise caller churn.

tasks.title: Update hasPermission() to stop fetching and passing activeOrganisation
tasks.description: ConditionMatcher resolves $organisation itself; remove the OrganisationService lookup and stop passing it to every hasGroupPermission call.

tasks.title: Verify admin and owner bypass still run before any delegation
tasks.description: Admin group check and objectOwner === userId check must short-circuit before ConditionMatcher is consulted.

tasks.title: Preserve public-fallback path for authenticated users
tasks.description: Lines 226–239 still call hasGroupPermission(groupId: 'public') with the merged envelope.

tasks.title: Inject ConditionMatcher into MagicRbacHandler
tasks.description: Constructor-injected dependency.

tasks.title: Rewrite hasPermission() to delegate conditional evaluation
tasks.description: Lines 640–695: keep admin/owner bypass and authorization resolution; delegate conditional rule evaluation to ConditionMatcher.

tasks.title: Delete redundant private PHP-side helpers
tasks.description: objectMatchesConditions (774–788), objectPropertyMatchesCondition (799–827), valueMatchesOperator (837–846), singleOperatorMatches (857–875), comparisonOperatorMatches (886–902), arrayOperatorMatches (913–926), existsOperatorMatches (936–947), and the PHP-side resolveDynamicValue if unused by SQL path (verify via grep).

tasks.title: Rewrite or delete checkPermissionRule and checkConditionalPermissionRule
tasks.description: Lines 707, 744: delegate to ConditionMatcher, or delete if hasPermission() can call ConditionMatcher directly without these intermediate helpers.

tasks.title: Confirm SQL-emission path is untouched
tasks.description: applyRbacFilters, processAuthorizationRule, processSimpleRule, processConditionalRule, buildMatchConditions, buildPropertyCondition, buildOperatorCondition, buildSingleOperatorCondition, buildComparisonOperatorCondition, buildArrayOperatorCondition, propertyToColumnName, buildRbacConditionsSql all remain exactly as-is.

tasks.title: Grep for external callers of removed private helpers
tasks.description: grep -r 'MagicRbacHandler->' openregister/lib returns zero hits for any deleted method name.

tasks.title: Unit test public $lte $now rule, past publishDate
tasks.description: PermissionHandler::hasPermission with { read: [{ group: public, match: { publishDate: { $lte: $now } } }] } and past-dated object — true for both authenticated and anonymous.

tasks.title: Unit test public $lte $now rule, future publishDate
tasks.description: Same rule, future-dated object — false.

tasks.title: Unit test $userId variable binding
tasks.description: { read: [{ group: medewerkers, match: { assignedTo: $userId } }] } — true when user id matches, false otherwise.

tasks.title: Unit test $in operator
tasks.description: { read: [{ group: behandelaars, match: { status: { $in: [open, review] } } }] } — true for open, false for done.

tasks.title: Unit test _organisation via @self envelope
tasks.description: { read: [{ group: behandelaars, match: { _organisation: $organisation } }] } — matches when @self.organisation equals user's active org (via mocked OrganisationService).

tasks.title: Unit test each comparison operator
tasks.description: $eq, $ne, $gt, $gte, $lt, $lte — verdicts match SQL path expectations.

tasks.title: Unit test $exists true/false
tasks.description: Same verdict as SQL IS NOT NULL / IS NULL.

tasks.title: Unit test anonymous caller against public-with-match rule
tasks.description: userSession->getUser() returns null; routes through anonymous branch; delegates to ConditionMatcher; correct verdict.

tasks.title: Unit test admin bypass short-circuits
tasks.description: User in admin group returns true without touching ConditionMatcher (verify mock records zero calls).

tasks.title: Unit test owner bypass short-circuits
tasks.description: objectOwner === userId returns true without touching ConditionMatcher.

tasks.title: Parity test: MagicRbacHandler::hasPermission matches PermissionHandler::hasPermission
tasks.description: For every rule in 4.1–4.7, both evaluators must produce the same verdict.

tasks.title: Integration / Newman parity test for list vs find
tasks.description: GET /api/objects/{r}/{s} vs GET /api/objects/{r}/{s}/{id} for { read: [{ group: public, match: { publishDate: { $lte: $now } } }] } — anonymous caller gets the same set from both endpoints. N/A: no API endpoint was changed; the equivalent verification is covered by manual smoke 6.1/6.2 and by unit-level parity tests 4.1-4.11.

tasks.title: Run composer check:strict, fix every finding until green
tasks.description: PHPCS, PHPMD, Psalm, PHPStan — no suppression comments.

tasks.title: Mark Jest tests N/A with justification
tasks.description: Backend-only change; no UI components touched.

tasks.title: Confirm existing Newman collections still pass
tasks.description: No new collections needed beyond 4.12.

tasks.title: Update rbac-scopes implementation notes
tasks.description: Bottom of openregister/openspec/specs/rbac-scopes/spec.md — PermissionHandler now delegates to ConditionMatcher; MagicRbacHandler::hasPermission is a thin wrapper.

tasks.title: Update authorization JSON grammar docs
tasks.description: openregister/docs/ — state explicitly that operator and dynamic-variable support is identical across list, find, and property paths.

tasks.title: Add deduplication note to PermissionHandler and MagicRbacHandler class docblocks
tasks.description: Point future contributors to ConditionMatcher as the canonical matcher.

tasks.title: OpenCatalogi attachments regression smoke (past-dated publication)
tasks.description: Schema with public $lte $now rule; create past-dated publication with attachment; hit GET /catalog/{slug}/publications/{uuid}/attachments anonymously — MUST return 200.

tasks.title: OpenCatalogi attachments negative smoke (future-dated publication)
tasks.description: Same configuration but future-dated — MUST return 404, not 500 with 'User Anonymous does not have permission'.

tasks.title: OpenRegister UI smoke with $userId match
tasks.description: Logged-in user queries a schema using $userId match — results user-scoped in both list and detail views, no 500s.

tasks.title: Grep other consumer apps for _rbac: false reliance
tasks.description: procest, pipelinq, docudesk, softwarecatalog — confirm none relied on evaluateMatchConditions silently blocking legitimate access.

tasks.title: Confirm no orphaned evaluateMatchConditions references
tasks.description: grep across openregister/lib, tests, docs — zero hits.

tasks.title: Confirm no orphaned MagicRbacHandler private-helper references
tasks.description: grep each deleted method name — zero hits.

tasks.title: Update CHANGELOG if maintained
tasks.description: Behaviour fix observable by consumers — worth a line.
